subcodes.first_line: Render thanks to the Lord that through the confirmations of God, glorified be His grandeur, thou hast entered the lofty tabernacle raised in His Name
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از عنایت حق جل جلاله در قباب عظمت که باسمش مرتفعست وارد شدی و از
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @wisdom [hikmat], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
